rationale: Spec text incorrectly prohibited SDAM flow on equal descriptions; fix required amending SDAM spec via SPEC-1517.
Tracking ticket to review and merge a PR adding coefficient encoding detail to the Decimal128 specification.
Spec improvement to document allowDiskUse version restrictions; resulted in spec commit, not a driver bug.
Coordination ticket to adopt runOn syntax in CRUD spec test YAML files across all drivers.
Standardizes bulk write format in YAML spec test files; pure test format change, no driver behavior fix.
Deprecation of geoHaystack/geoSearch helpers following server deprecation; not a spec conformance issue.
Spec update to default OCSP off for hard-fail TLS libraries; spec commit cited, no driver was wrong.
Spec clarification that change stream command event expectations cover a subset; no driver bug, depends on SPEC-1657.
Cross-driver coordination to reduce TCP keepalive default for Azure compatibility; network tuning, not spec conformance.
Extended JSON spec was silent on dollar-prefixed fields not matching known types; spec amended via SPEC-1757.
CI tooling fix to increase EC2 wait timeout in AWS auth test script; no driver behavior involved.
Updates SDAM monitoring test YAML files to add explicit directConnection URI option; test format update.
waitQueueTimeoutMS description in URI options spec was copy-pasted incorrectly from maxPoolSize; spec doc bug.
New CMAP spec behavior: pause pool when server becomes unknown; spec improvement coordinated via SPEC-1242/1530.
Evergreen CI configuration to start standalone with requireAPIVersion for stable API testing; CI tooling only.
CI tracking ticket for adding Host header assertion to mock OCSP responder; test tooling, not driver behavior.
CI tooling improvement for ECS IMDSv2 role checks; no driver spec involvement.
Drivers must update test infrastructure to verify Host header in OCSP HTTP requests; test tooling update across drivers.
Deprecation of eval command helpers following server removal in 4.0; API lifecycle change, not spec nonconformance.
Corrupted deep_bson benchmark data file; data corruption in benchmarking spec asset, not a driver behavior issue.
CI test failure due to botocore API change removing 'force' parameter; AWS tooling compatibility, not driver spec.
Atlas testing infrastructure workaround for Atlas cluster state issues during failover tests; CI reliability fix.
CI optimization to use shallow git clone for driver repositories; build tooling, no spec involvement.
Introduces $exists/$assertExists syntax for meta-assertions in spec test YAML; unified test format improvement.
Standardizes CRUD spec test YAML format for options nesting; pure test format consistency change.
mongo-orchestration incompatibility with Python 3.8 due to removed cgi.escape; CI tooling compatibility bug.
Adds missing MongoDB 4.4 wire version 9 to the wireversion feature list spec document.
Driver documentation link updates for support/forum/feedback URLs; doc maintenance, no spec involvement.
Resumable error criteria too broad; getMore errors could loop indefinitely. Spec amended to limit resume attempts.
Atlas testing reliability fix for failover test timeout; CI infrastructure workaround, no driver spec involved.
Workload executor spec incorrectly specified -1 instead of 0 for unspecified numFailures/numErrors; spec doc fix.
Atlas testing log collection missing mongod logs; CI infrastructure gap, no driver spec involvement.
Unified CRUD test asserts wrong number of getMore command events for some server releases; test file bug fix.
License file in specifications repo doesn't match README; repo housekeeping, no driver behavior involved.
New transactions spec requirement: use w:majority when retrying commitTransaction; spec + test update coordination.
SDAM errors spec test YAML file missing index field in writeError; test file defect causing deserialization issues.
Spec change requiring retry of first getMore after resume; includes new YAML test, coordinated across drivers.
SDAM spec RST document has heading order corrupted; sections appear under wrong topology type headings.
Server change to listCollections output for time-series collections; downstream driver tracking, not a spec conformance issue.
Server renamed acceptAPIVersion2 to acceptApiVersion2; drivers sync versioned-api test files to match new parameter name.
Implement $count accumulator builder for $group stage; new server feature tracking, no spec conformance issue.
Bump maxWireVersion to 13 for MongoDB 5.0 compatibility check; routine version support update, not a nonconformance.
Stable API spec change requiring API options on getMore and transaction-continuing commands; spec updated, drivers implement.
run-load-balancer.sh stop incorrectly requires MONGODB_URI; CI script usability fix, no driver spec involved.
Unified test format spec: clarify evaluation order for runOnRequirements is flexible; test runner spec improvement.
New server feature adding hint to delete command; proactive spec and driver addition, not a nonconformance bug.
Versioned API test specifies wrong minimum server version (4.7 vs 4.9); test file bug requiring sync across drivers.
LB spec silent on concurrent cursor.next()/close(); labeled spec-change, issue-split across all drivers to address gap.
CMAP MUST requirement for minPoolSize in ready state is unimplementable as written; spec wording doesn't express intent.
Evergreen CI task coloring for Atlas setup failures; CI cosmetic/UX improvement, no driver spec involved.
